summary: Frontend-only testing of mobile navbar overlay menu portal fix. All 12 test cases passed. The createPortal fix successfully renders the mobile menu at document.body level, ensuring position:fixed works correctly even after scrolling. Menu appears at top of viewport (60px from top) regardless of scroll position.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile navbar overlay menu portal fix verified. createPortal renders menu at document.body level. Key data-testid: mobile-menu-panel. Hamburger button: button[aria-label='Toggle navigation menu']. Menu has position:fixed, top:60px (mobile), z-index:9999. Backdrop at z-index:9998. Body gets overflow-hidden class when menu open.

mobile_390px.test_9_link_click_closes_and_navigates: PASS - navigated to /san-francisco-appliance-repair, menu closed, overflow-hidden removed

portal_fix_verification.issue: backdrop-filter on nav element creates new containing block, breaking position:fixed for child elements
portal_fix_verification.fix: createPortal renders mobile menu at document.body level, outside nav element
portal_fix_verification.body_scroll_lock: useEffect adds/removes overflow-hidden class on document.body
